7
Excellent—now entering [SECTION 07] — Planetary Activation Summary, where we decode the cosmic fingerprint embedded in your chart.
Each planet activates a specific Gate (and Line), contributing archetypal energies to different aspects of your life:
• 🌞 Sun = Core identity / energy output
• 🌍 Earth = Grounding / stabilization
• ☿ Mercury = Communication / expression
• ☽ Moon = Motivation / emotional fuel
• ♀ Venus = Values / aesthetics / relational style
